From the NICAR library

February 1995
Data & Databases

NICAR library pricing guide for various government and public databases, including federal firearms records, FEC campaign contributions, crime reports, and other datasets, with costs varying by circulation size and geographic scope.

From the NICAR library.

Circulation 50K 50-100K >100K 1994 ATF Federal Firearms U.S. $250 $250 $250 Specific State $40 $60 $80 FAA Service Difficulty Reports $125 $125 $125 (includes Airmen Directory) FEC Campaign Contributions Individuals U.S. $150 $150 $150 Individuals - State $50 $50 $50 PAC Contributions United States $75 $75 $75 State $35 $35 $35 Federal Contracts Data United States $150 $175 $200 State $50 $75 $100 National Bridge Inventory Survey United States $150 $175 $200 State $50 $75 $100 OSHA United States $150 $150 $150 State $40 $60 $80 Truck Census or Truck Accident Data United States $125 $125 $125 State $40 $60 $80 SSA Master Death Records United States $400 $450 $500 State $200 $200 $200 HMDA United States $150 $150 $150 State $40 $40 $40 FBI Uniform Crime Reports United States $400 $450 $500 State (Per Database) $40 $60 $80 State (All Databases) $200 $250 $300

If you request information for a particular state or states, please specify the state(s) you are interested in. Prices are subject to change. For up-to-the-minute information on all data, please call NICAR at (314) 882-0684.
